headline: How Kroger (KR) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Split On 2026 Earnings Potential
summary: Kroger’s investment story is shifting at the margin, with one Fair Value estimate trimmed from US$73.50 to US$73.41, while some Street price targets still sit as high as US$75 and others have been reduced into the high US$60s. Those small adjustments reflect a split view, with bullish analysts pointing to potential upside under the current playbook and more cautious voices flagging a tougher setup for earnings and valuation. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit into the broader...

headline: CrowdStrike, Broadcom Earnings and Jobs Report: What to Watch This Week
summary: A heavy slate of economic data headlines the first week of March, culminating in the February jobs report. Investors will also weigh earnings from companies, including Broadcom, as well as market fallout from the weekend strikes on Iran.

headline: Kroger taps inventory drones for cold chain distribution operations
summary: The system autonomously scans pallet locations across ambient and freezer zones, enabling weekly, facility-wide inventory visibility.
